subject: A desolate marshland strewn with gnarled, leafless trees and a glowing magical shrine or beacon at the heart of the bog
description: A vast, fetid swamp stretches into the distance under a sickly green-yellow sky. Twisted, bare trees rise from murky ground, their branches clawing upward like skeletal fingers. In the middle distance, a tall stone monument or shrine emits a pale luminous glow, casting eerie reflections in the standing water. The horizon is hemmed in by jagged, dark cliffs or ruins. The palette is dominated by sour ochres, putrid greens, and deep browns, evoking decay and stagnation. No figures are visibly present; the landscape itself is the subject.
foreground: Murky water and pale, dead trees rising from the bog
background: Glowing stone shrine or pillar with jagged dark cliffs framing the horizon
